Aggregated execute batches: completed 2/2.
Batch 1: Validation for T9 succeeded through all non-git checks. `py_compile` passed for the six bug-fix files, the six-module import smoke passed, the Bug 3 grep sweep returned zero hits, the static reread confirms the required Bug 1/2/6 success criteria, the discovered script checks ran, and the throwaway deque repro demonstrated the old mutation failure and the fixed snapshot path before being deleted. The bundled commit could not be created in this sandbox because `.git` is not writable and `git add` cannot create `.git/index.lock`.
Batch 2: T10 completed. Available full-module verification checks passed without regressions in the six bug-fix files. No project test package or pytest/unittest suite exists beyond ad hoc script entrypoints; `scripts/debug.py --help`, `scripts/backfill_reactions.py --help`, `scripts/test_social_picks.py`, and `python -m unittest discover -s . -p 'test*.py'` were run. `scripts/test_social_picks.py` remained network-blocked from Supabase in this environment but exited cleanly and did not indicate a regression. A throwaway runtime harness also directly verified the critical Bug 1 and Bug 2 behavior, then was deleted.

task_updates.executor_notes: Validation is clean up to the commit boundary. `py_compile` passed for all six bug-fix files, the six-module import smoke passed, and the Bug 3 sweep still returns zero hits. Static reread confirms Bug 1 is fully solved in code because the DM branch now produces the same non-None `replied_to` shape and `recent_messages` history as the guild branch and sets `replied_to_anchor_note` whenever `replied_to` is present; Bug 2 is fully solved in code because the only response-loop sends go through `_send_with_retry`, only 5xx `discord.HTTPException` is retried/swallowed, non-5xx propagates, exhaustion re-raises, and the catch-all sends fixed neutral copy with its own protective `try/except`; Bug 6 is solved because `messages = list(messages)` is the first statement after the empty guard and the throwaway repro demonstrated the old deque-mutation failure while the current snapshot path stored the original batch without error. Unrelated worktree entries remain untouched in `git status`. The only reason T9 is not fully complete is environmental: `.git` is not writable here, so staging and the single bundled commit cannot be created from this sandbox.

task_updates.executor_notes: Verification-focused test discovery found no `tests/` package and no pytest/unittest suite beyond script entrypoints. Full-module checks run: `python scripts/debug.py --help`, `python scripts/backfill_reactions.py --help`, `python scripts/test_social_picks.py`, and `python -m unittest discover -s . -p 'test*.py'`. `debug.py` and `backfill_reactions.py` exited cleanly; `unittest discover` reported 0 tests and passed; `scripts/test_social_picks.py` exited cleanly but could not reach Supabase in this environment, so it logged connection errors and printed `No summary found for today!` without indicating a regression in the six bug-fix files. A throwaway runtime harness then directly exercised the critical admin-chat fixes and passed: Bug 1 is functionally covered because DM processing now emits `replied_to`, `replied_to_anchor_note`, and non-empty `recent_messages`; Bug 2 is functionally covered because 5xx send failures retry and either succeed or fall back to the neutral message after exhaustion, while non-5xx send failures bypass retry and also surface only the neutral user-facing message. No regressions were found and no further source changes were required.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed: `py_compile` passed for all six files; the six-module import smoke passed; the Bug 3 grep sweep returned zero hits; the static reread of Bugs 1, 2, and 6 matches the required success criteria; the throwaway deque repro passed and was deleted; and `git status` still shows the unrelated `.megaplan` schema files, `src/features/summarising/summariser.py`, and `scripts/` files as separate dirty/untracked worktree entries. The only unmet part of SC9 is the single bundled commit, which is blocked because this sandbox cannot write to `.git` (`index.lock` creation is denied), so no new commit could be created or pushed from this session. Bugs 1, 2, and 4 still need live dev-Discord runtime smoke outside this environment.

Verification checks passed without regressions. The available full-module checks completed successfully apart from the expected environment-level Supabase connectivity failure inside `scripts/test_social_picks.py`, which still exited 0. A throwaway runtime harness directly verified the two critical success criteria: DM context now includes reply/history context plus the anchor note, and send failures now behave correctly with 5xx retry/exhaustion handling and neutral user-facing fallback instead of raw exception text.
